verdict: An outstanding Hard chart that captures the syncopated rhythm and energy of the song perfectly, with only minor 16th-note flow hitches.

issues.problem: Awkward 16th-note double-step on the left foot (D -> L).
A rapid 16th-note transition from D to L requires a same-foot double tap, disrupting the flow slightly.
Awkward 16th-note double-step from U to R.
